Interface BuiltInRule

All Superinterfaces:
HasOrigin, Named, Rule, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
All Known Subinterfaces:
ExternalSolverRule
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule, AbstractBlockContractRule, AbstractLoopContractRule, AbstractLoopInvariantRule, AbstractSideProofRule, BlockContractExternalRule, BlockContractInternalRule, CloseAfterMerge, InfFlowBlockContractInternalRule, InfFlowLoopContractInternalRule, InfFlowUseOperationContractRule, InfFlowWhileInvariantRule, IsabelleRule, JmlAssertRule, LoopApplyHeadRule, LoopContractExternalRule, LoopContractInternalRule, LoopScopeInvariantRule, MergeRule, ModalitySideProofRule, ObserverToUpdateRule, OneStepSimplifier, QueryExpand, QuerySideProofRule, SetStatementRule, SMTRule, UseDependencyContractRule, UseOperationContractRule, WdBlockContractInternalRule, WdWhileInvariantRule, WhileInvariantRule
@NullMarked public interface BuiltInRule extends Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
Built-in rule interface. As applications of this rule kind may not be successful, in each case one has to ensure that the goal split is done only iff the application was successful.

  • Method Details

    • isApplicable

      boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, @Nullable PosInOccurrence pio)
      Returning true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)

    • isApplicableOnSubTerms

      boolean isApplicableOnSubTerms()

    • createApp

      IBuiltInRuleApp createApp(@Nullable PosInOccurrence pos, TermServices services)

    • apply

      ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, RuleApp ruleApp)
      Description copied from interface: RuleExecutor
      applies the given rule application to the specified goal
      Specified by:
      apply in interface RuleExecutor<Goal>
      Parameters:
      goal - the goal that the rule application should refer to.
      ruleApp - the rule application that is executed.
      Returns:
      List of the goals created by the rule which have to be proved. If this is a close-goal-taclet ( this.closeGoal () ), the first goal of the return list is the goal that should be closed (with the constraint this taclet is applied under).

    • getExecutor

      default RuleExecutor<Goal> getExecutor()
      Description copied from interface: Rule
      Returns the rule executor for this rule. The rule executor encapsulates the logic for rule applications.
      Specified by:
      getExecutor in interface Rule
      Returns:
      the rule executor for this rule

    • getOrigin

      default @Nullable String getOrigin()
      Description copied from interface: HasOrigin

      Information about the origin of the rule.

      Should be a human-readable location where the user can find the declaration of the rule.

      This field is set by the parser with [url]:[lineNumber]

      Specified by:
      getOrigin in interface HasOrigin
